title: AIGovernanceFramework
description: Workspace-level AI governance framework configuration. A framework is a library of controls that drives compliance assessments. Enabling a framework auto-applies it to in-scope AI assets via the autoApply rules.

frameworkSource.description: Where the framework definition came from

assessmentCadence.description: How often this framework requires reassessment of in-scope assets

autoApplyRules.description: Predicate that determines which AI assets this framework automatically applies to. An asset is in-scope when its attributes match every populated rule (empty list = match any).

assetTypes.description: AI asset types this framework applies to (aiApplication, llmModel, mcpServer)

regions.description: Deployment regions this framework applies to (EU, US, UK, APAC, CA, LATAM, MENA)

riskClasses.description: Risk classifications this framework applies to (Unacceptable, High, Limited, Minimal)

deploymentStages.description: Deployment stages this framework applies to (Production, Staging, Development, etc.)

id.description: Unique identifier of the AI Governance Framework.

name.description: Name that identifies this framework (e.g. eu_ai_act).

fullyQualifiedName.description: Fully qualified name of the framework.

description.description: Description of what this framework covers.

reference.description: External reference for the framework (e.g. 'Reg EU 2024/1689', 'AI 100-1', 'ISO/IEC 42001:2023').

region.description: Geographic jurisdiction this framework covers (e.g. 'European Union', 'United States', 'Global').

forkedFrom.description: When source is 'ForkedFrom', the framework this was forked from.

enabled.description: Whether this framework is enabled in the workspace. Disabled frameworks remain in the library but do not auto-apply.

stewards.description: Users or teams responsible for this framework's assessments.

updatedAt.description: Last update time in Unix epoch milliseconds

changeDescription.description: Change that led to this version

incrementalChangeDescription.description: Change that led to this version

deleted.description: When true, indicates the entity has been soft deleted

extension.description: Entity extension data with custom attributes
